since_last: 69% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +7.37%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -2.45% · Gold -3.01% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 69% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +7.37%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +7.37%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.45%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +13.06%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +13.06%, CEVA +11.09%, LSCC +10.97%, SMCI +10.87%, INTC +10.82%. Laggards: INOD -6.59%, SPCX -4.78%, IBM -4.56%, WDAY -3.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.78% at $182.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.78% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
